title: Our Apps
name: AutoRoute
subtitle: Explore HK by bus with an AI companion
description: AutoRoute is an AI-powered bus route planner that helps you explore Hong Kong with ease. Simply tell AutoRoute where you want to go, and it will generate the best bus routes for you. Whether you're a local or a tourist, AutoRoute makes navigating Hong Kong's extensive bus network simple and efficient.

features.title: Your Private AI Travel Companion
features.description: Chat naturally with an intelligent AI companion right in the app. Ask anything:
bulletpoints: How to get to Sai Kung from Central?

features.title: Complete Privacy & No Tracking
features.description: Private by design: All chats happen only on your device. No location data is ever collected, tracked, or sent to any server. Your conversations and queries never leave your phone. Zero cloud dependency for your personal info.

features.title: Always Ready — Fully Offline
features.description: All bus data, routes, stops, and core Apple AI intelligence are stored directly in the app. No internet? No problem. Perfect for reliable, stress-free travel.
bulletpoints: Natural language AI chat for bus routes
Comprehensive coverage of franchised buses, green minibuses, and major operators across Hong Kong Island, Kowloon, New Territories & Lantau
Offline route search, saved locations, stop finder & journey planning
Simple, clean interface — no ads, no clutter

AutoRoute app screenshot showing bus route options and AI chat interface
AutoRoute app screenshot showing bus route options and AI chat interface

summary: Whether you're a daily commuter, a curious explorer, or a first-time visitor wanting to experience authentic Hong Kong, AutoRoute makes every bus journey smarter, more fun, and completely private.
ctamessage: Download AutoRoute now and start exploring HK like a local — offline, private, and with AI by your side!
